title: Founder Weekly
intro: The week's leverage points in one read: the investor-ready update, the top competitive move to watch, and the single most important decision.

sections.heading: Investor / board update
sections.prompt: Draft this week's investor update. INPUT: {{notes}}. Lead with the one number that matters. If inputs are missing, produce a labelled template with [FILL IN] — never invent metrics.

sections.heading: Competitive watch
sections.prompt: A short competitive read for this week from: {{market}}. The one move to watch and the one response option. Mark unknowns [FILL IN].

sections.heading: The decision to force
sections.prompt: The single highest-stakes open decision this week: {{decision}}. Frame it, the options, and the reversibility. If none is provided, output the framework.
